heroHeadline: Day 39: O3 Collective Council Holds; World Cup Security Buildup Intensifies; El Jardinero Still at Large
heroSubtitle: Day 39 since El Mencho's killing at Tapalpa, Jalisco. O3 (Juan Carlos Valencia González) maintains control under a collective council structure enforced by Grupo Élite's paramilitary capacity. El Jardinero (Audias Flores Silva) — primary high-value targeting objective with a $5 million U.S. bounty — remains at large with his regional plaza network intact. Guadalajara enters a 10-week final security mobilization ahead of the FIFA World Cup 2026, with 2,500+ troops deployed and President Sheinbaum's 100,000-strong security force promise as backdrop. Operativo Enjambre cumulative total: 64+ officials detained across Jalisco, Michoacán, and additional states.
footerNote: Data sourced from SEDENA, SSPC, FGR, DEA, U.S. DOJ, NCTC, U.S. Treasury (OFAC), InSight Crime, Crisis Group, Wilson Center, Reuters, AP, Wall Street Journal, France 24, CGTN, Al Jazeera, Latin Times, Infobae México, La Silla Rota, WOLA, and major Mexican news outlets. All contested figures noted. Last update: April 2, 2026.
